description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 10th Weight 40 lbs.; Price 61,300 gp DESCRIPTION Mail of malevolence hangs in rags and tatters and acts as non-magical chainmail to wearers who lack at least a moderate evil aura. When worn by a sufficiently evil character, it instead functions as +2 unrighteous chainmail. Mail of malevolence does not bestow a negative level on good wearers. The wearer of mail of malevolence gains SR 21, but only against spells with the good descriptor. In addition, whenever the wearer channels negative energy to harm living creatures, she heals a like amount of damage herself regardless of whether she is living or undead. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells righteous might, spell resistance; Cost 30,800 gp
